allowed_flow_language: User demand enters serving as prompts, API calls, code-agent tasks, and queued work.
Training and post-training produce model artifacts that still need evaluation and release decisions.
blocked_claims: model quality; solved safety; benchmark superiority

allowed_flow_language: Approved model artifacts become serving candidates under product and evaluation constraints.
blocked_claims: hidden governance detail; release causality; live rank

allowed_flow_language: Inference produces streamed tokens, answers, code actions, and metered usage.
blocked_claims: revenue; cost per token; energy per token; productivity

allowed_flow_language: Accelerator capacity supports training as a synchronized build-time workload.
blocked_claims: exact FLOPs; cluster size; utilization; training cost

allowed_flow_language: Accelerator capacity supports inference as a latency and throughput workload.
blocked_claims: exact throughput; neutral performance ratio; cost

allowed_flow_language: Networking and storage move parameters, activations, and training data across the system.
Networking, storage, routing, and retrieval paths shape serving capacity and latency.
blocked_claims: exact latency; workload volume; universal architecture

allowed_flow_language: Software makes accelerators usable through kernels, runtimes, libraries, schedulers, and monitoring.
blocked_claims: market dominance; quantified lock-in; universal developer preference

allowed_flow_language: Facilities and cooling mediate how accelerator systems can be installed and operated.
blocked_claims: PUE; water use; facility performance; deployment scale

allowed_flow_language: Electricity and interconnection capacity precede useful facility operation.
blocked_claims: delivered electrons; named site service; emissions outcome

allowed_flow_language: Power access, timing, and flexibility can shape when serving capacity is available.
blocked_claims: routine dispatchable AI load; energy-per-token; guaranteed flexibility

allowed_flow_language: Metered use and product demand can feed the next capacity-planning loop.
blocked_claims: revenue proof; demand growth; customer value; utilization
